# Arab Tech Trends (عرب تك)
> Arabic technology news, reviews, and guides since 2012.

عرب تك موقع عربي متخصص في أخبار التقنية، مراجعات الهواتف والتطبيقات، شروحات الأندرويد والآيفون والكمبيوتر والألعاب.

## Discovery
- [Sitemap](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/sitemap-index.xml): Full URL index (~880 articles)
- [RSS feed](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/feed.xml): Subscribe to updates
- [llms.txt](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/llms.txt): This file

## Key pages
- [Homepage](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/): Latest tech news and featured articles
- [All posts](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/posts/): Full article archive
- [Search](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/search/): Site search
- [Guides hub](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/guides/): Pillar topic guides
- [About](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/about/): Editorial policy and mission
- [Tags](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/tags/): Browse by topic tag

## Pillar guides (evergreen)
- [Samsung Galaxy guide](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/guides/samsung-galaxy/)
- [iPhone & iOS guide](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/guides/iphone-ios/)
- [WhatsApp & apps guide](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/guides/whatsapp-apps/)
- [AI tools guide](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/guides/ai-tools/)

## Categories
- [أخبار تقنية](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/category/news/): Technology news
- [هواتف](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/category/phones/): Smartphones
- [أندرويد](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/category/android/): Android news and guides
- [آيفون](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/category/iphone/): iPhone and Apple
- [تطبيقات](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/category/apps/): Apps and services
- [كمبيوتر](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/category/computer/): PC and Windows
- [ألعاب](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/category/games/): Gaming
- [شروحات](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/category/guides/): Tutorials and how-tos
- [ذكاء اصطناعي](https://www.arabtechtrends.com/category/ai/): AI tools and news

## About
Arab Tech Trends publishes original Arabic content covering smartphones, apps, AI tools, gaming, and computing. Founded 2012.

- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/profile.php?id=61560338201303
- YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@arabtechtrends
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/arabtechtrends_official/
